; Fixture phase 1. Do not add a launch action before hardware confirmation.
; Chiappa/Ferrari fixture source SHA-256: 095e19d24d23ee8d2cbc67f9a08d3af5a13e27644eb7a361fb6d0aa10f136c4e
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[2857280009207495592]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[6502786168]]#[[233745975898428]] > [[8398044571386570029]]#[[8400129135001204805]] > [[7712155293725601]][.[[214634455770]]=`toolbarProvider.editingTools`]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&454089850271038938&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: lettersHomeLauncher
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "letters-home-launcher"
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/letters-home/icons/letter"
                ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Open Letters Home")
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {}
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
